name: Interactive Portfolio
tagline: Black portfolio deck with top-nav rhythm, organic violet shapes, carousel dots, and project-gallery layouts.

palette.description: black presentation surface with electric blue and soft lavender organic shapes

typography.style: wide geometric display type with simple portfolio body text

best_for: Creative portfolios, agency credentials, designer case studies, and visual project showcases that need movement and personality.
avoid_for: Traditional board decks, clinical reports, or information-heavy consulting work.

source_inspiration.name: Slidesgo Modern and Interactive Portfolio
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS interpretation based on public visual reference; not a pixel copy and does not reuse source assets.
